metadata.title: Add user authentication and profile features
metadata.description: This PR adds basic user authentication with login functionality and a user profile endpoint that displays user data.
metadata.author: junior-dev

additions: 11:     query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE username='{username}' AND password='{password}'"
context: 7: from flask import Flask, request, redirect, render_template, session

issues.description: SQL Injection vulnerability - unsanitized user input in SQL query allows attackers to bypass authentication or extract sensitive data
Open Redirect vulnerability - unvalidated redirect target allows attackers to redirect users to malicious sites
Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability - unescaped user input in HTML response allows JavaScript injection
